Crop Name: sweetpotato

Profile
- Season type: medium-season (TSUM total=2052 C.d)
- Temperature adaptation: warm-adapted (TBASEM=10.00 C)
- Development driver: temperature + daylength (IDSL=1, DLO=1.00 h)
- Root/water trait: moderately deep-rooted, more drought-tolerant (RDMCR=120.00 cm, DEPNR=4.50)
- Assimilation trait: moderate assimilation potential (AMAX peak=40.00)
- Storage allocation: late storage allocation (FOTB onset DVS=1.55)

Nutrient capacity proxies (leaf maxima)
- NMAXLV: DVS0=0.0600, DVS1=0.0400
- PMAXLV: DVS0=0.0090, DVS1=0.0060
- KMAXLV: DVS0=0.0780, DVS1=0.0520

Use guidance
- Treat this as prior knowledge for zero-shot policy transfer.
- Final action should still adapt to current weather/soil observations.
